title: DLQ Metadata
description: Tracks batch-level DLQ timestamps globally and per-job. Single document with key 'dlq:meta' in the changes-worker.dlq collection. Fetched via simple GET (no N1QL query). Updated once per batch, not per document.

last_inserted_at.description: Unix epoch when the most recent batch wrote entries to the DLQ (global — latest across all jobs)

last_inserted_job.description: Job identity (checkpoint.client_id) of the batch that last inserted

last_drained_at.description: Unix epoch when the most recent replay successfully drained entries (global — latest across all jobs)

last_drained_job.description: Job identity that performed the last drain

jobs.description: Per-job DLQ history. Keyed by job_id, each entry tracks that job's own insert/drain timestamps independently.

last_inserted_at.description: Unix epoch when this job last wrote entries to the DLQ

last_drained_at.description: Unix epoch when this job last drained entries from the DLQ
